# `ecma48-csi` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/ecma48-csi.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## CUP: Cursor Position (`csi.cup`)

Rows and columns use protocol coordinate space.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI row ; column H`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cup.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cup.seq)

## SGR: Reset Attributes (`csi.sgr.reset`)

Resets graphic rendition state to terminal defaults.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 0 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_reset.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_reset.seq)

## SGR: Bold (`csi.sgr.bold`)

Sets bold or increased intensity for following text.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 1 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_bold.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_bold.seq)

## SGR: RGB Foreground (`csi.sgr.foreground_rgb`)

Fixture uses the semicolon truecolor form.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 38 ; 2 ; r ; g ; b m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_rgb.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_rgb.seq)

## SGR: Attribute And Color Combination (`csi.sgr.style_combo`)

Fixture combines bold, named foreground, and RGB background.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI Ps ; ... m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_style_combo.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_style_combo.seq)

## SGR: Underline Color (`csi.sgr.underline_color`)

Fixture uses the semicolon truecolor underline color form.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 58 ; ... m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_color.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_color.seq)

## SGR: Double Underline (`csi.sgr.double_underline`)

Some terminals historically treated SGR 21 as bold-off; use SGR 24 to clear.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 21 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_double_underline.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_double_underline.seq)

## SGR: Clear Underline (`csi.sgr.not_underlined`)

Clears single, double, and styled underline state.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 24 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_underlined.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_underlined.seq)

## SGR: Curly Underline (`csi.sgr.underline_curly`)

xterm, Kitty, iTerm2, and WezTerm commonly support underline substyles.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 : 3 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_curly.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_curly.seq)

## SGR: Dotted Underline (`csi.sgr.underline_dotted`)

Vendor support varies; unsupported terminals usually render a plain underline.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 : 4 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_dotted.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_dotted.seq)

## SGR: Dashed Underline (`csi.sgr.underline_dashed`)

Vendor support varies; unsupported terminals usually render a plain underline.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 : 5 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_dashed.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_dashed.seq)

## SGR: Vendor Underline Style (`csi.sgr.underline_vendor`)

Preserves unknown underline substyle values for vendor-specific extensions.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 : n m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_vendor.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_vendor.seq)

## SGR: Overline (`csi.sgr.overline`)

Support is less universal than bold, italic, and underline.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 53 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_overline.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_overline.seq)

## SGR: Clear Overline (`csi.sgr.not_overlined`)

Clears SGR overline state without changing underline or ideogram state.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 55 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_overlined.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_overlined.seq)

## SGR: Ideogram Underline (`csi.sgr.ideogram_underline`)

Often ignored by modern terminal emulators; preserved for ECMA-48 completeness.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 60 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_ideogram_underline.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_ideogram_underline.seq)

## SGR: Ideogram Double Underline (`csi.sgr.ideogram_double_underline`)

Often ignored by modern terminal emulators; preserved for ECMA-48 completeness.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 61 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_ideogram_double_underline.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_ideogram_double_underline.seq)

## SGR: Ideogram Overline (`csi.sgr.ideogram_overline`)

Often ignored by modern terminal emulators; preserved for ECMA-48 completeness.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 62 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_ideogram_overline.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_ideogram_overline.seq)

## SGR: Ideogram Double Overline (`csi.sgr.ideogram_double_overline`)

Often ignored by modern terminal emulators; preserved for ECMA-48 completeness.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 63 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

## SGR: Ideogram Stress (`csi.sgr.ideogram_stress`)

Often ignored by modern terminal emulators; preserved for ECMA-48 completeness.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 64 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

## SGR: Clear Ideogram Attributes (`csi.sgr.not_ideogram`)

Clears SGR 60-64 ideogram attributes.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 65 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_ideogram.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_ideogram.seq)

## SGR: Dim (`csi.sgr.dim`)

Sets dim or decreased intensity for following text.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 2 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_dim.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_dim.seq)

## SGR: Italic (`csi.sgr.italic`)

Sets italicized text where the terminal font supports it.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 3 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_italic.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_italic.seq)

## SGR: Underline (`csi.sgr.underline`)

Sets a single, straight underline. Equivalent in appearance to the SGR 4:1 substyle.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_plain.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_plain.seq)

## SGR: Straight Underline (`csi.sgr.underline_straight`)

Explicit substyle form of a plain underline, equivalent in appearance to SGR 4.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 : 1 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_straight.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_underline_straight.seq)

## SGR: Blink (`csi.sgr.blink`)

Sets blinking text where the terminal implements blink.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 5 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_blink.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_blink.seq)

## SGR: Reverse Video (`csi.sgr.reverse`)

Swaps the foreground and background colors.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 7 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_reverse.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_reverse.seq)

## SGR: Hidden (`csi.sgr.hidden`)

Conceals following text; some terminals ignore this attribute.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 8 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_hidden.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_hidden.seq)

## SGR: Strikethrough (`csi.sgr.strikethrough`)

Sets crossed-out (strikethrough) text.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 9 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_strikethrough.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_strikethrough.seq)

## SGR: Clear Bold And Dim (`csi.sgr.not_bold_dim`)

Clears both bold and dim; SGR has no separate reset for either alone.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 22 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_bold_dim.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_bold_dim.seq)

## SGR: Clear Italic (`csi.sgr.not_italic`)

Clears italic text.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 23 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_italic.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_italic.seq)

## SGR: Clear Blink (`csi.sgr.not_blink`)

Clears blinking text.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 25 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_blink.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_blink.seq)

## SGR: Clear Reverse Video (`csi.sgr.not_reverse`)

Restores normal (non-reversed) foreground and background.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 27 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_reverse.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_reverse.seq)

## SGR: Clear Hidden (`csi.sgr.not_hidden`)

Reveals text previously concealed with SGR 8.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 28 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_hidden.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_hidden.seq)

## SGR: Clear Strikethrough (`csi.sgr.not_strikethrough`)

Clears crossed-out (strikethrough) text.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 29 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_strikethrough.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_strikethrough.seq)

## SGR: Named Foreground (`csi.sgr.foreground_named`)

Sets one of the 8 standard ANSI foreground colors. Fixture uses red (SGR 31).

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI Ps m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_named.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_named.seq)

## SGR: Named Bright Foreground (`csi.sgr.foreground_named_bright`)

Sets one of the 8 xterm-derived bright foreground colors. Fixture uses bright red (SGR 91).

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI Ps m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_named_bright.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_named_bright.seq)

## SGR: 256-Color Foreground (`csi.sgr.foreground_indexed`)

Fixture uses the semicolon 256-color form.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 38 ; 5 ; n m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_indexed.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_fg_indexed.seq)

- Syntax: `CSI Ps m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

- Syntax: `CSI Ps m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

Fixture uses the semicolon 256-color form.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 48 ; 5 ; n m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

Fixture uses the semicolon truecolor form.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 48 ; 2 ; r ; g ; b m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

## SGR: Default Foreground (`csi.sgr.not_foreground`)

Resets the foreground color to the terminal default.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 39 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_foreground.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_foreground.seq)

## SGR: Default Background (`csi.sgr.not_background`)

Resets the background color to the terminal default.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 49 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_background.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_background.seq)

## SGR: Default Underline Color (`csi.sgr.not_underline_color`)

Resets the underline color to the text foreground color.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 59 m`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_underline_color.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sgr_not_underline_color.seq)

## CUU: Cursor Up (`csi.cuu`)

Fixture moves up three cells.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count A`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cuu.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cuu.seq)

## CUD: Cursor Down (`csi.cud`)

Fixture moves down three cells.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count B`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cud.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cud.seq)

## CUF: Cursor Forward (`csi.cuf`)

Fixture moves right three cells.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count C`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cuf.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cuf.seq)

## CUB: Cursor Backward (`csi.cub`)

Fixture moves left three cells.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count D`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cub.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cub.seq)

## CNL: Cursor Next Line (`csi.cnl`)

Fixture moves to the first column of the second following line.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count E`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cnl.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cnl.seq)

## CPL: Cursor Previous Line (`csi.cpl`)

Fixture moves to the first column of the second preceding line.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count F`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpl.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpl.seq)

## CHA: Cursor Horizontal Absolute (`csi.cha`)

Fixture moves to protocol column 12.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI column G`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cha.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cha.seq)

## CHT: Cursor Forward Tabulation (`csi.cht`)

Fixture moves forward by two tab stops.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count I`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cht.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cht.seq)

## HPA: Horizontal Position Absolute (`csi.hpa`)

Fixture moves to protocol column 12.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI column ``
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_hpa.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_hpa.seq)

## VPA: Vertical Position Absolute (`csi.vpa`)

Fixture moves to protocol row 12.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI row d`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_vpa.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_vpa.seq)

## HVP: Horizontal And Vertical Position (`csi.hvp`)

Fixture moves to protocol row 12 and column 34.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI row ; column f`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_hvp.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_hvp.seq)

## HPR: Horizontal Position Relative (`csi.hpr`)

Fixture moves three cells right.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count a`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_hpr.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_hpr.seq)

## VPR: Vertical Position Relative (`csi.vpr`)

Fixture moves three cells down.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI count e`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_vpr.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_vpr.seq)

## SCOSC: Save Cursor (`csi.scosc`)

Use with care; save/restore state is terminal-global.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI s`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_scosc.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_scosc.seq)

## SCORC: Restore Cursor (`csi.scorc`)

Restores the cursor position previously saved with SCOSC.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI u`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_scorc.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_scorc.seq)

## CPR: Cursor Position Report (`csi.cpr`)

Rows and columns use protocol coordinate space.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_tmux.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_tmux.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_betamax.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_betamax.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_kitty.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_kitty.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_alacritty.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_alacritty.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_wezterm.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_wezterm.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_foot.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_foot.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_xterm.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cpr_report_capture_xterm.seq)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## DSR: Query Cursor Position (`csi.dsr.cursor_position`)

Duplicate untagged requests coalesce while pending.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 6 n`
- Responds with: `csi.cpr`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_dsr_cursor_position.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_dsr_cursor_position.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty supported (6); betamax supported (6); foot supported (6); kitty supported (6); tmux supported (6); wezterm supported (6); xterm supported (6)

## DA1: Query Primary Device Attributes (`csi.da.primary`)

Primary device attributes identify broad terminal class and feature flags.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI c`
- Responds with: `csi.da.primary_report`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_da_primary_query.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_da_primary_query.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty supported (5); betamax supported (9); foot supported (11); kitty supported (7); tmux supported (9); wezterm supported (16); xterm supported (35)

## DA1: Primary Device Attributes Report (`csi.da.primary_report`)

The numeric payload is preserved for terminal identification layers.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture

## DA2: Query Secondary Device Attributes (`csi.da.secondary`)

Secondary device attributes usually include firmware or patch-level numbers.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI > c`
- Responds with: `csi.da.secondary_report`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

- Conformance: alacritty supported (12); betamax supported (9); foot supported (14); kitty supported (13); tmux supported (10); wezterm supported (11); xterm supported (12)

The numeric payload is preserved for terminal identification layers.

## DA3: Query Tertiary Device Attributes (`csi.da.tertiary`)

Tertiary attributes are preserved as an opaque identity string.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI = c`
- Responds with: `csi.da.tertiary_report`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

- Conformance: alacritty no-reply; betamax supported (14); foot supported (14); kitty no-reply; tmux no-reply; wezterm supported (14); xterm supported (14)

## DA3: Tertiary Device Attributes Report (`csi.da.tertiary_report`)

The identity payload is intentionally not interpreted by the session decoder.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

## DSR: Query Terminal Status (`csi.dsr.status`)

A normal terminal response is DSR 0, meaning no malfunction.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 5 n`
- Responds with: `csi.dsr.status_ok`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_dsr_status_query.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_dsr_status_query.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty supported (4); betamax supported (4); foot supported (4); kitty supported (4); tmux supported (4); wezterm supported (4); xterm supported (4)

## DSR: Terminal Status OK (`csi.dsr.status_ok`)

Reports that the terminal is operating with no malfunction.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)

## DECRQM: Query ANSI Mode (`csi.ansi_mode.query`)

Fixture queries IRM, the insert/replace mode with numeric mode 4.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI mode $ p`
- Responds with: `csi.ansi_mode.report`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_query.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_query.seq)
- Notes: This is the non-private form of request mode and does not use a `?` marker.
- Conformance: alacritty supported (7); betamax no-reply; foot no-reply; kitty supported (7); tmux supported (7); wezterm supported (7); xterm supported (7)

## DECRPM: ANSI Mode Report (`csi.ansi_mode.report`)

Fixture reports IRM as reset with `CSI 4 ; 2 $ y`.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_tmux.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_tmux.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_kitty.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_kitty.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_alacritty.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_alacritty.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_wezterm.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_wezterm.seq), [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_xterm.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ansi_mode_report_report_capture_xterm.seq)
- Notes: reply syntax pending live capture; The shared mode report event preserves the numeric mode and state.

Reports text area height and width in cells.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 18 t`
- Responds with: `csi.xtwinops.text_area_cells_report`

## ED: Clear Entire Screen (`csi.ed.clear_screen`)

Erases the entire screen and leaves the cursor where it is.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 2 J`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_clear_screen.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_clear_screen.seq)

## ED: Erase Below (`csi.ed.erase_below`)

Erases from cursor through the end of the display.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 0 J`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_0.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_0.seq)

## ED: Erase Above (`csi.ed.erase_above`)

Erases from the start of the display through the cursor.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 1 J`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_1.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_1.seq)

## ED: Erase Scrollback (`csi.ed.erase_scrollback`)

xterm extension that erases saved lines where supported.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 3 J`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_3.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ed_3.seq)

## EL: Erase Right (`csi.el.erase_right`)

Erases from cursor through the end of the line.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 0 K`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_el_0.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_el_0.seq)

## EL: Erase Left (`csi.el.erase_left`)

Erases from the start of the line through the cursor.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 1 K`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_el_1.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_el_1.seq)

## EL: Erase Line (`csi.el.erase_all`)

Erases the entire active line.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 2 K`
- References: [XTerm Control Sequences (invisible-island)](https://www.invisible-island.net/xterm/ctlseqs/ctlseqs.html) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_el_2.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_el_2.seq)

## ICH: Insert Blank Characters (`csi.ich`)

Inserts blank character positions at the cursor and shifts existing cells right.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n @`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ich.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ich.seq)

## IL: Insert Lines (`csi.il`)

Inserts blank lines at the cursor within the active scrolling area.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n L`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_il.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_il.seq)

## DL: Delete Lines (`csi.dl`)

Deletes lines at the cursor within the active scrolling area.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n M`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_dl.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_dl.seq)

## DCH: Delete Characters (`csi.dch`)

Deletes character positions at the cursor and shifts following cells left.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n P`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_dch.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_dch.seq)

## SU: Scroll Up (`csi.su`)

Scrolls content up by the requested number of lines.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n S`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_su.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_su.seq)

## SD: Scroll Down (`csi.sd`)

Scrolls content down by the requested number of lines.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n T`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sd.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sd.seq)

## SL: Scroll Left (`csi.sl`)

Scrolls content left; emulator support is less common than SU/SD.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n SP @`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sl.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sl.seq)

## SR: Scroll Right (`csi.sr`)

Scrolls content right; emulator support is less common than SU/SD.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n SP A`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sr.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sr.seq)

## ECH: Erase Characters (`csi.ech`)

Erases character positions at the cursor without shifting following cells.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n X`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_ech.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_ech.seq)

## CBT: Cursor Backward Tabulation (`csi.cbt`)

Moves backward by tab stops.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n Z`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_cbt.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_cbt.seq)

## REP: Repeat Preceding Character (`csi.rep`)

Repeats the preceding graphic character when the terminal implements REP.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI n b`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_rep.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_rep.seq)

## TBC: Tab Clear (`csi.tbc`)

Mode 3 clears all horizontal tab stops.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI Ps g`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_tbc.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_tbc.seq)

## SM: Insert/Replace Mode (`csi.sm.insert_replace`)

Sets IRM, the public insert/replace mode.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 h`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_sm_insert_replace.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_sm_insert_replace.seq)

## RM: Insert/Replace Mode (`csi.rm.insert_replace`)

Resets IRM, returning to replacement behavior.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `CSI 4 l`
- References: [ECMA-48: Control Functions for Coded Character Sets, 5th edition](https://www.ecma-international.org/publications-and-standards/standards/ecma-48/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/ecma48/csi_rm_insert_replace.seq`](../../../fixtures/ecma48/csi_rm_insert_replace.seq)
